issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.next_action: Keep breaker-first truth on /, /execution, /execution/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and current-state docs until release math actually improves.
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: recent canonical 250 rows remains a distribution pathology
issues.next_action: Keep drilling the pathological slice itself instead of diluting the root cause into generic leaderboard or venue discussions.

issues.title: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.
issues.action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified
issues.next_action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.next_action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro_plus_all_4h patch must stay visible but reference-only
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; do not promote it from reference-only until current-live exact support reaches the minimum rows.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: recent canonical window 100 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=100, alerts=['constant_target', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0000, delta_vs_full=-0.6265, dominant_regime=bull(100.00%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0059, avg_quality=-0.1930, avg_dd_penalty=0.2122, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:30/56, frozen:4, compressed:26, expected_static:4, overlay_only:4, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:14, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-18 17:07:18.981230 -> 2026-04-18 18:52:15.079637, adverse_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-18 17:07:18.981230 -> 2026-04-18 18:52:15.079637, prev_win_rate=0.01, delta_vs_prev=-0.01, prev_quality=-0.2355, quality_delta_vs_prev=0.0425, prev_pnl=-0.0064, pnl_delta_vs_prev=0.0005, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.4798→0.194,Δσ=0.888)/feat_4h_bias20(1.4521→0.1908,Δσ=0.7617)/feat_4h_rsi14(61.2869→54.1627,Δσ=0.709), new_compressed=feat_nw_slope, frozen_examples=feat_dxy(0.0/1)/feat_nq_return_1h(0.0/1)/feat_nq_return_24h(0.0/1), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/100)/feat_ear(0.0016/99)/feat_scales_ssr(0.0017/59), expected_static_examples=feat_dxy[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_nq_return_1h[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_nq_return_24h[weekend_macro_market_closed], overlay_only_examples=feat_claw[research_sparse_source]/feat_claw_intensity[research_sparse_source]/feat_fang_pcr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_nq_return_24h(1/9876)/feat_dxy(1/3304)/feat_nq_return_1h(1/2864), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-18 18:49:43.144791:0:bull:-0.2637/2026-04-18 18:50:59.274778:0:bull:-0.2533/2026-04-18 18:52:15.079637:0:bull:-0.2687, adverse_examples=2026-04-18 18:49:43.144791:0:bull:-0.2637/2026-04-18 18:50:59.274778:0:bull:-0.2533/2026-04-18 18:52:15.079637:0:bull:-0.2687
